message:
fix(api): add #[must_use] to crdt, persistent_ds, self_stabilize public APIs

Annotates 59 pure/accessor methods across CRDTs (GCounter, PnCounter,
GSet, OrSet, LwwRegister, MvRegister, VersionVector, convergence_hash),
persistent data structures (PersistentMap, VersionedStore), and
self-stabilizing reconciliation (ReconcileSession, StateFingerprint,
reconcile_trees, reconcile_with_stats).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
